SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY.description: Supabase service_role secret key (server-side only, never exposed to browser)

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key used as default when users have not set their own key in Settings

OPENAI_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for OpenAI-compatible API (default: https://api.openai.com/v1)
